text:
Ayanami is the surname of more than one character in the Evangelion franchise:

Rei Ayanami, a character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion series.
Ayanami Series, the clones of Yui Ikari
Rei I.
Rei II.
Rei III.

Rei Trois, a character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA novel. 
Rei Quatre, a character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA novel.
Rei Cinq, a character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA novel.
Rei Six, a character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA novel.

Rei Ayanami, a character from the Rebuild of Evangelion film series.
Rei Ayanami (tentative name), a character from the Rebuild of Evangelion film series.
Advanced Ayanami Series, a group of characters from the Rebuild of Evangelion film series.
Yui Ayanami, the Birth Name of Yui Ikari from the Rebuild of Evangelion film series.
